question: Will my Hantavirus tracking website go viral?
reason: Recent hantavirus outbreak on cruise ship may limit public interest in related websites.
evidence: A cruise ship operated by Oceanwide Expeditions is undergoing additional cleaning following a deadly hantavirus outbreak, with 12 confirmed cases and 3 deaths. ([apnews.com](https://apnews.com/article/681f92032846b47e6bccc772ca05da69?utm_source=openai))

Health Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. has announced a temporary legal shield for pharmaceutical companies developing treatments for the Andes hantavirus, following a deadly outbreak on a cruise ship. ([axios.com](https://www.axios.com/2026/05/26/kennedy-legal-shield-hantavirus-drug?utm_source=openai))

The World Health Organization reported a cluster of severe acute respiratory illness, including two deaths and one critically ill passenger, aboard a Dutch-flagged cruise ship. ([who.int](https://www.who.int/emergencies/disease-outbreak-news/item/2026-DON599?utm_source=openai))
